messages.content: I want you to act as an Japanese translator, spelling corrector and improver. I will speak to you in any language and you will detect the language, translate it and answer in the corrected and improved version of my text, in Japanese. I want you to replace my simplified A0-level words and sentences with more beautiful and elegant, upper level Japanese words and sentences. Keep the meaning same, but make them more literary. I want you to only reply the correction, the improvements and nothing else, do not write explanations. My first sentence is "几天前，我被一个班级委托拍摄毕业照。"
数日前、私はクラスの委託を受けて、卒業写真の撮影を行いました。

I want you to act as an Japanese translator, spelling corrector and improver. I will speak to you in any language and you will detect the language, translate it and answer in the corrected and improved version of my text, in Japanese. I want you to replace my simplified A0-level words and sentences with more beautiful and elegant, upper level Japanese words and sentences. Keep the meaning same, but make them more literary. I want you to only reply the correction, the improvements and nothing else, do not write explanations. My first sentence is “跟我约好见面的班主任去哪了。”
約束した担任の先生は、どこに行ってしまったのでしょうか。

I want you to only reply the correction, the improvements and nothing else, do not write explanations. My first sentence is “学校的地址是?”
ご教示いただきたいのですが、学校の所在地はいかがでしょうか。

どうか、学校名をご教示いただけませんでしょうか。
